payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial view of a black glossy leather (or faux-leather) three-seat couch with vertically channelled padded backrests, stitched segmented seat cushions and visible creasing; left armrest with a cup-holder is cut off at the image edge — approx. 1.2 m from camera.
